items.title: [正面] In 2024 Morimens split my life into "before" and "...
items.summary:
In 2024 Morimens split my life into "before" and "after". It's been 1.5 years, and it's still the gacha I invest the most into (and I've been in this hell for ten years since FGO in 2015).

Its art and music are incredible, the setting is intriguing, and the story and gameplay improve constantly. The game itself is quite generous with its currency (a F2P player can easily afford having every character in the game), and it rewards clever thinking in the way any good tactical deckbuilder should. It also regularly receives many QoL updates and various game modes, such as PvP mode with completely different gameplay approach (with "Constructed" and "Draft" modes), randomized roguelike, competitive ranking-based weekly dungeons, and more.

What also sets it apart is how the devs stay in touch with the fan base, receiving and working on the feedback, accepting translation suggestions, setting up community interactive events, and more. No titan of the gacha market could be involved with their players on such a level. 
TL;DR Give it a try if you like Slay the Spire, Cthulhu Mythos. or Gothic Victorian vibes.

items.title: [正面] I like it. It is a gacha slay the spire.
items.summary: I like it. It is a gacha slay the spire.
